title: ophrys × valdevariabilis
intro: Ophrys × valdevariabilis is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Ophrys sphegodes and Ophrys tenthredifolia. This unique plant is prized for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ophrys × valdevariabilis include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, eczema, and other skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infused in herbal tea, with some practitioners also using it in salves and creams to take advantage of its therapeutic properties.
